top5.title: Check for a Secure Website
top5.description: Before entering passwords, payment details, or other sensitive information, look for https:// and the padlock icon in your browser.

top5.title: Be Careful with Links
top5.description: Do not click unexpected links in emails, text messages, pop-ups, or social media messages. When possible, preview the link first and make sure it goes where you expect.

top5.title: Use Strong, Unique Passwords
top5.description: Use a different password for every important account. Longer passwords are safer, and a reputable password manager can help you create and store them securely.

top5.title: Turn On Extra Account Protection
top5.description: Enable multi-factor authentication whenever it is available. An authenticator app or passkey is usually best, but even text-message verification is better than having no extra protection at all.
